# elementArray(withCode:)

**Instance Method**

Returns an array containing every child of the receiver with the given class-type code.

## Declaration

```swift
func elementArray(withCode code: DescType) -> SBElementArray
```

## Parameters

- **code**: A four-character code that identifies a scripting class.

## Return Value

An [doc://com.apple.Scripting-Bridge/documentation/ScriptingBridge/SBElementArray] object containing every child of the receiver whose class matches `code`.

## Discussion

`SBObject` subclasses use this method to implement application-specific property accessor methods. You should not need to call this method directly.



## Getting Properties and Elements

- **property(with:code:)**: Returns an object of the designated scripting class representing the specified property of the receiver
- **property(withCode:)**: Returns an object representing the specified property of the receiver.
